workflow_runs.name: Release
workflow_runs.display_title: fix(windows): resolve further MSBuild compile errors

head_commit.message:
fix(windows): resolve further MSBuild compile errors
- Remove local extern void Bell_ApplySettings() to prevent compiler warnings/errors.
- Properly include Bell.h in TrayPopover.cpp.
- Add braces around APP_SET_DATA in single-line if-statements in TrayPopover.cpp to prevent macro expansion logic errors.
- Bump version to 0.4.5.
